text.title: Agent On-Call Runbook Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: draft-steps
step.action: Write steps; default to tier-1 read.

step.name: label-tiers
step.action: Tag each step with tier; flag tier-2/3.

step.name: append-escalation
step.action: Add final step that escalates to named human on non-resolved.
